extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
3ecd1de1-b628-4409-af89-83f6abeb316f.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
3ecd1de1-b628-4409-af89-83f6abeb316f.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
3ecd1de1-b628-4409-af89-83f6abeb316f.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
3ecd1de1-b628-4409-af89-83f6abeb316f.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
3ecd1de1-b628-4409-af89-83f6abeb316f.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
809a1a09-1385-4b3d-b038-6daa0421baa1.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
809a1a09-1385-4b3d-b038-6daa0421baa1.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
809a1a09-1385-4b3d-b038-6daa0421baa1.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
809a1a09-1385-4b3d-b038-6daa0421baa1.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.

ca2a73ef-4ba7-43b9-942b-f27c3d8986c0.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate whether need a merge plan..
ca2a73ef-4ba7-43b9-942b-f27c3d8986c0.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
ca2a73ef-4ba7-43b9-942b-f27c3d8986c0.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

24c37f15-44d1-40b8-b0f7-40d4da4dc066.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.

24c37f15-44d1-40b8-b0f7-40d4da4dc066.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
